description: A designed White House statistics/infographic card with a dramatic, cinematic monochrome treatment. The full-bleed background is a desaturated black-and-white photograph of President Trump standing in an industrial/factory setting (overhead warehouse lighting, steel framing, and a partly visible 'JOBS!' banner at left), captured mid-gesture clapping his hands and looking toward the viewer; he wears a dark suit, tie, and American-flag lapel pin. Overlaid across the lower-center in very large bright green serif numerals is '$3,500,' styled to evoke money/currency. Below it, in white serif type, is the caption 'Average Tax Cut the American Taxpayer Will Receive This Year.' At the bottom center is the small white line-art White House emblem. The composition uses the single big green dollar figure as the focal hero statistic, with the desaturated photo making the green pop. The propaganda technique is a benefit-claim stat card touting the 'Working Families Tax Cuts' (per the tweet) by attaching a concrete per-taxpayer dollar amount to Trump's leadership, aimed at a general taxpayer audience to credit the administration with personal financial gains.
notable_text: $3,500 | Average Tax Cut the American Taxpayer Will Receive This Year
